codeReview.summary: Reviewed transcript evidence and diffs tied to this rerun. The fix now updates production `SearchIndexStore.applyChunkDiff` to reconcile same-hash ID/cardinality drift via deterministic delete+insert of mismatched IDs while preserving true no-op behavior when hashes and IDs both match; updated ProjectionPipelineService tests align with this behavior. This directly addresses the prior blockers where one fix commit was unrelated to indexing and another touched only test determinism without production-path remediation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The final handoff `commitId` points to the synthesis commit instead of the implementation commits that changed production/test code.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff for session `0e2c2f53-28aa-4e69-a2bb-bac71aa1e304` reports `commitId: 5cac711`; `git show --stat 5cac711` changes only `.factory/validation/.../synthesis.round4.json`, while implementation landed in `7fe57e4` (SearchIndexStore) and `da94268` (ProjectionPipelineServiceTests).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The indexing skill requires reading `.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/library/user-testing.md`, but this rerun transcript does not show either file being read.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for `0e2c2f53-28aa-4e69-a2bb-bac71aa1e304` contains mission/AGENTS reads but no references to `.factory/library/architecture.md` or `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

summary: Pass. This rerun provides the missing production-path fix in `SearchIndexStore.applyChunkDiff` and corresponding test expectation updates, resolving the two prior blocking findings (unrelated commit scope and test-only remediation).
